subject: Hey....
body:
I m so sorry!! Ill continue pry for you!
If you are in tow I would love to give you a big kiss!
Take care!  And if some what I can do let me know! Any think I've walk your dog!
You are too yang ll have many better years to came! 
I never ll forget  all you did to me!
Love you,
Xx ██
Sent via BlackBerry from T-Mobile
